title: How A Directory Could Speed Up Payments In The U.S.
excerpt: The U.S. instant payment volume is estimated at 30 million transactions per month, while that volume is 5 billion in Brazil. How can a directory close the gap? Matera Co-founder
body:
The U.S. instant payment volume is estimated at 30 million transactions per month, while that volume is 5 billion in Brazil. How can a directory close the gap? Matera Co-founder and CEO, Carlos Netto, explains the use of directories, requirements needed for payments, and proven success in other countries in his latest Forbes article.

Read the full article on Forbes.com [here](https://www.forbes.com/councils/forbestechcouncil/2024/07/30/how-a-directory-could-speed-up-payments-in-the-us/).
